moves.translation: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

moves.name: (SHORYU_L)
note: 1-14F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵
※持続の3F目以降は個別ダメージ（800）
moves.translation: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14\nConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 35\n* Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

moves.name: (SHORYU_M)
note: 1-8F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵

moves.translation: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9\nInvincible to projectiles from frames 5 - 11\nConsidered airborne from frames 9 - 51

moves.name: (SHORYU_EX)
moves.translation: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 10\nConsidered airborne from frames 9 - 24 and 33 - 74

moves.name: (F_SHORYU)
moves.command_modern: （奮迅脚中に）623 ＋攻撃/（奮迅脚中に）6 ＋ SP
note: 1-18F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵
moves.translation: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 18\nInvincible to projectiles from frames 3 - 11\nConsidered airborne from frames 11 - 51

moves.name: (214LK)
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 28.

moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 8 - 41

moves.name: (214HK)
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 10 - 61

moves.name: (214K_EX)
moves.translation: Considered airborne from frames 10 - 77

moves.name: (F_214HK)
moves.command_modern: （奮迅脚中に）214+攻撃/（奮迅脚中に）2 ＋ SP
note: 2,4,6,8,10段目は正面の相手に当たらない
moves.translation: Does not hit the opponent in front of you on the 2nd, 4th, 6th, 8th, and 10th hits\nConsidered airborne from frames 10 - 61

moves.name: (214K_Air)
moves.command: （前ジャンプ中に）214 + LK | MK | HK
moves.command_modern: （前ジャンプ中に）214 ＋攻撃/（前ジャンプ中に）SP

moves.name: (214K_AirEX)
moves.command_modern: （前ジャンプ中に）214 ＋攻撃二つ/(前ジャンプ中に)AUTO＋SP
note: 2,４段目は正面の相手に当たらない
(2,4段目の攻撃はダメージ700、SAゲージ増加量600)
moves.translation:
Considered airborne from frames 10 - 77
Does not hit the opponent in front of you on the 2nd and 4th attacks
(The 2nd and 4th attacks do 700 damage and increases the Super Art gauge by 600)
7 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: (RYUBI_L)
note: 18-20F　地上の相手に当たらない
moves.translation: Does not hit opponents on the ground from frames 18 - 20\nDoes 950 damage from frames 21 - 23\nConsidered airborne from frames 9 - 28

moves.name: (RYUBI_M)
note: 23-24F　地上の相手に当たらない
moves.translation: Does not hit opponents on the ground from frames 23 - 24\nConsidered airborne from frames 14 - 32

moves.name: (RYUBI_H)
note: 28-29F　地上の相手に当たらない

moves.name: (RYUBI_EX)
note: 9-12F,18F　地上の相手に当たらない
2段目のみヒット時、追加のコンボ補正はかからない
moves.translation: Does not hit opponents on the ground from frames 9 - 12 and 18\nConsidered airborne from frames 10 - 27\nDoes not have additional combo scaling if the 2nd attack hits

moves.name: (F_RYUBI)
note: 9-12F,18-19F　地上の相手に当たらない
2段目のみヒット時、追加のコンボ補正はかからない
moves.translation: Does not hit opponents on the ground from frames 9 - 12 and 18 - 19\nConsidered airborne from frames 10 - 28\nDoes not have additional combo scaling if the 2nd attack hits

moves.name: (JINRAI_L)

note: 動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.translation: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

空中ヒット時床バウンド
moves.translation: Always in Punish Counter state during execution\nProduces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

moves.command_modern: （OD轟雷落とし後に）6 ＋ 攻撃/（OD轟雷落とし後に）SP
note: 動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.translation: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

しゃがみ状態の相手に当たらない

note: 動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.translation: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

moves.name: (SA1)
note: 1-9F　打撃・投げに対して無敵
カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.translation: Invincible to strikes and throws on frames 1 - 9\nValues do not change on counter or Punish Counter\nMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%

moves.name: (SA2)
note: ヒット時6段目以降に派生
moves.translation: Transitions to the full attack after the 6th attack\nMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%

moves.name: (SA3_SHINRYU)
note: カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
初段ガードor空振り時、以下の性能変化
・ヒット時のDゲージ減少量9000
※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.translation:
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 18
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%

Following properties occur if the first attack is blocked or misses
- Damage is 2100
- Reduces Drive Gauge by 9000 on hit
- Does not go into full cinematic animation
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: (SA3.5)
moves.command_modern: （体力25%以下で）236236＋強/（体力25%以下で）2＋強SP
note: カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
初段ガードor空振り時、以下の性能変化
・ヒット時のDゲージ減少量16000
※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.translation:
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 18
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%

Following properties occur if the first attack is blocked or misses
- Damage is 2300
- Reduces Drive Gauge by 16000 on hit
- Does not go into full cinematic animation
* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: (THROW_N)
note: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化
moves.translation:
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: (THROW_N)
note: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化
moves.translation:
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: (DASH_B)
moves.translation: Invincible to throws from frames 1 - 15

moves.name: (D_IMPACT)
moves.skill: ドライブインパクト （焔撃ち）
note: パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化
・空中ヒットきりもみダウン
moves.translation:
Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27
Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wall
On Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:
- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground
- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: (D_REVERSAL)
moves.skill: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル （雷突蹴）
moves.command: （ガード中 or ドライブパリィ成立中に）6 ＋ HPHK
moves.command_modern: （ガード中 or ドライブパリィ成立中に）6＋DI
note: リカバリアブルダメージ
moves.translation: Recoverable damage\nCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 22\n5 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.skill: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（雷突蹴）
note: リカバリアブルダメージ
moves.translation: Recoverable damage\nCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 20\n5 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
note: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可
※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可
硬直部分はガードのみ可
動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.translation:
*1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush
*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are held
Only blocks can be performed during the recovery period
Always in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
note: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、
入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する
（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)
方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する
硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）
ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.translation:
Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)
If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.
Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)
The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: (DRIVE_PARRY)
moves.skill: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
note: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する
ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.translation: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame\nNo screen freeze occurs.\nThe player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: (DRIVE_STEP_PARRY)
moves.skill: パリィドライブラッシュ
note: ※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可
24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.translation: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame\n* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move\n   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: (DRIVE_STEP_CANCEL)
moves.skill: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.command: （必殺技キャンセル可能な攻撃ヒット中に）5656 ＋ 6 or (N or 6) + MPMK
moves.command_modern: （必殺技キャンセル可能な攻撃ヒット中に）5656 ＋ 6 or (N or 6) + DP
note: ※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可
25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.translation: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame\n* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move\n   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame

moves.name: (STEP_PARRY_RUSH)
moves.skill: パリィドライブラッシュ

moves.translation: Can be rapid canceled
